title: Vasquez Lab Correction Statement
snippet: Prof. Vasquez issues statement correcting viral misrepresentations of her research.
content: Professor Vasquez has issued a formal correction: 'Our study was conducted on zebrafish, not humans. We found accumulation, not causation of neurodegeneration. The viral blog post fabricated claims we never made. No peer-reviewed paper on human neurodegeneration exists from our lab.'
